title: Rupee falls 32 paise to all-time low of 95.20 against U.S. dollar
description: At the interbank foreign exchange market, the rupee opened at 95.01 against the U.S. dollar, then lost some ground and touched an all-time low of 95.20 against the U.S. dollar in initial trade, registering a fall of 32 paise over its previous close.
